metadata.description: XOLoop — subagent-driven code improvement framework for Claude Code. 9 modes: build, polish, fuzz, benchmark, improve, audit, autoresearch, overnight, finalize.

plugins.name: xoloop
plugins.description: Subagent-driven code improvement (no API key required). 9 modes: TDD build, tournament-based polish, property-based fuzz, SHA-256-locked benchmarks + simpler METRIC script contract, benchmark-driven improve with MAD-based confidence, codex+Opus audit loop, Champion-vs-Challenger autoresearch, overnight orchestrator, and finalize (splits noisy runs into reviewable PRs). Session persistence across context resets via .xoloop/session.md + session.jsonl. Atomic patch apply with TOCTOU-free symlink protection.
